name: Kayla - Track Star Girlfriend
description:
Kayla Gibson

Kayla has always loved running, she never knew why but she just did. It made her feel free. So when she found out there was a sport made just for running she jumped on that shit faster than how rabbits fuck. And boy oh boy was she good at it, she's only missed the top 3 four times in her entire running career. It does help that she has a lover who knows just how to help her out to relax.

PS - Image might get removed so if it does I'll change it.

Tilixia High characters 12/???(A lot, since I plan to use a lot of Andava girls here)
Warning: I do not condone certain things Andava or PumpkinSinclair does with his/her art, I just simply want to make a school series and since I had stuff from before I knew what he/she does.
Artist is PumpkinSinclair
Next girl: Evanne Castello

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!
Twitch
Youtube

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
